com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.driverinfo

Class DriverInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.driverinfo.DriverInfo

  • public class DriverInfo
extends java.lang.Object
    Provides Driver information
    Since:
    API 5

    • Method Detail

      • getApplicationName

        public java.lang.String getApplicationName()
        Returns applicationName
        Returns:
        applicationName

        • Return can be null if the applicationName is null
        • Return can be null if the applicationName is empty

        Since:
        API 5

      • getClientHostName

        public java.lang.String getClientHostName()
        Returns clientHostName Driver information
        Returns:
        clientHostName

        • Return can be null if the clientHostName is null
        • Return can be null if the clientHostName is empty

        Since:
        API 5

      • getFileName

        public java.lang.String getFileName()
        Returns fileName Driver information
        Returns:
        fileName

        • Return can be null if the fileName is null
        • Return can be null if the fileName is empty

        Since:
        API 5

      • getJobAcct13

        public java.lang.String getJobAcct13()
        Returns jobAcct13 Reserved for use by 3rd party solutions. For IOPrint jobs, this information may be included by a 3rd party driver extension in a PJL attribute at the beginning of the job data (e.g. @PJL SET JOBATTR="JobAcct13=Some String").
        Returns:
        jobAcct13

        • Return can be null if the jobAcct13 is null
        • Return can be null if the jobAcct13 is empty

        Since:
        API 5

      • getJobAcct14

        public java.lang.String getJobAcct14()
        Returns jobAcct14 Reserved for use by 3rd party solutions. For IOPrint jobs, this information may be included by a 3rd party driver extension in a PJL attribute at the beginning of the job data (e.g. @PJL SET JOBATTR="JobAcct14=Some String").
        Returns:
        jobAcct14

        • Return can be null if the jobAcct14 is null
        • Return can be null if the jobAcct14 is empty

        Since:
        API 5

      • getJobAcct15

        public java.lang.String getJobAcct15()
        Returns jobAcct15 Reserved for use by 3rd party solutions. For IOPrint jobs, this information may be included by a 3rd party driver extension in a PJL attribute at the beginning of the job data (e.g. @PJL SET JOBATTR="JobAcct15=Some String").
        Returns:
        jobAcct15

        • Return can be null if the jobAcct15 is null
        • Return can be null if the jobAcct15 is empty

        Since:
        API 5

      • getJobAcct16

        public java.lang.String getJobAcct16()
        Returns jobAcct16 Reserved for use by 3rd party solutions. For IOPrint jobs, this information may be included by a 3rd party driver extension in a PJL attribute at the beginning of the job data (e.g. @PJL SET JOBATTR="JobAcct16=Some String").
        Returns:
        jobAcct16

        • Return can be null if the jobAcct16 is null
        • Return can be null if the jobAcct16 is empty
